brandDNA.designLanguage: Editorial scroll, luxury single-page experience with numbered sections

sections.label: Stagionalita'
sections.description: Full-bleed hero with bold keywords (Stagionale, Spontaneo, Tracciabile), product imagery, scrolling marquee text, value cards (01 Purezza, 02 Sostenibilità, 03 Tracciabilità)

sections.label: Monorigini
sections.description: Interactive product slider with per-item accent colors, detail cards with specs (origin, altitude, variety, process), image gallery

sections.label: Cosa ci guida
sections.description: 6 expandable Q&A items about philosophy and process, numbered 01-06

sections.label: Storia
sections.description: 4 chapters with image slider, brand history narrative

structure.navigation: Minimal top nav with hamburger menu revealing full-screen overlay with decorative illustration
structure.footer: Full-bleed background image, contact info, social links, legal

typography.approach: Serif display headings with sans-serif body — editorial magazine feel
typography.sectionNumbers: Large, light-weight display numbers (001, 002, 003, 004) as decorative anchors

animations.marquee: Horizontal infinite scroll text marquee with keywords
animations.productSlider: Smooth horizontal carousel with pagination dots matching accent colors

layoutPatterns.valueCards: Numbered 01-03 cards with icon + short description
layoutPatterns.productCards: Image + title + tags (Grani, Moka, Espresso, Filtro) + CTA

adaptation.target: 808 GXOOSE — Dark trap/808 beat producer website

001.adapted: BEATS — Hero with bold producer name, animated waveform, genre tags

002.adapted: CATALOG — Beat catalog with audio players, BPM/key info, pricing

004.adapted: CONTACT — Licensing info, booking, social links
